description_long: This object is a pair of scissors featuring two elongated, sharp metal blades joined at a central pivot point. The handles are oval-shaped and appear to be made of a blue, possibly plastic or rubber-coated material, providing a comfortable grip. The blades are sleek, black, and taper to a fine, pointed tip, suitable for precision cutting tasks. The pivot joint is visible and likely secured with a rivet or screw, allowing the blades to open and close smoothly. The finger loops are asymmetrical, with one loop slightly larger to accommodate multiple fingers for better control. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of blue-handled scissors with sharp, pointed black blades and a visible central pivot joint. The handles are oval and asymmetrical, designed for comfortable gripping.
description_view_0: Side view showing both blue oval handles and the full length of the sharp, pointed black blades.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open position of the scissors and the asymmetry of the finger loops.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handles and the sleek, pointed blades from the other side.
description_view_3: Angled view from above, emphasizing the central pivot and the relative size difference between the finger loops.
attribute_handle_type: Asymmetrical oval handles, likely ambidextrous, with a smooth, possibly plastic or rubberized coating for grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet or screw pivot joint, not adjustable.
attribute_finger_loop_design: One loop is larger than the other, both oval-shaped, smooth surface, no soft inserts or anatomical contours.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips designed for precision cutting.
